title: The Ghousul Azam Abdul Qader Jillani Mosque Trust (Repeal) Ordinance, 1985
title_en: The Ghousul Azam Abdul Qader Jillani Mosque Trust (Repeal) Ordinance, 1985
description: An Ordinance to repeal the Ghousul Azam Abdul Qader Jillani Mosque Trust Ordinance, 1984. WHEREAS it is expedient to repeal the Ghousul Azam Abdul Qader Jillani Mosque Trust Ordinance, 1984 (XLVI of 1984); NOW, THEREFORE, in pursuance of the Proclamation of the 24th March, 1982, and in exercise of all powers enabling him in that behalf, the President is pleased to make and promulgate the following Ordinance:-

provisions.title: 1. Short title
provisions.content: 1. This Ordinance may be called the Ghousul Azam Abdul Qader Jillani Mosque Trust (Repeal) Ordinance, 1985 .

provisions.title: 2. Repeal
provisions.content: 2. The Ghousul Azam Abdul Qader Jillani Mosque Trust Ordinance, 1984 (XLVI of 1984), is hereby repealed.
